rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALBERT J. LOCOCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/4/20. A second amended petition on waiver of accounting was filed on 1/8/20, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. Notice of the second amended petition on waiver of accounting, etc., must be given at least 15 days before 2/4/20. A preview of the second amended petition on waiver of accounting shows that the allegation regarding whether or not notice was required to be given to the CVCB pursuant to Probate Code Section 9202(b) still has not been made, and the balance of the statutory compensation to be paid to the executor is incorrect in the prayer. If notice to creditors was just given to the FTB and to the DHCS on 12/20/19, the estate cannot close until 60 days after actual notice was given.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JANG 1991 TRUST (DATED 4/11/91) TRUST

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/4/20 to be heard with objections. An amendment was filed on 12/13/19; notice of an amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] If waivers of notice of the amendment cannot be obtained and filed, the hearing may need to be continued further. No original bank statements appear to have been filed yet. [LRSF 14.62.] A statement regarding retention of original statements must also be filed. [LRSF 2.11 M.4.]

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/04/20. Examiner does not have the required courtesy copy. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be dropped off at the Superior Court in room 202. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6).
